description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized black SUV with a robust and angular body design, featuring a prominent chrome grille and the Toyota emblem on the front. The vehicle has four passenger doors, large side mirrors, and silver side steps for easier entry. The windows are tinted, and the roof is slightly elevated, suggesting ample interior headroom. The wheels are silver with a multi-spoke design, and the rear features a subtle spoiler and wraparound taillights. The overall build is sturdy, with a high ground clearance suitable for both urban and light off-road environments. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have standard seating and dashboard arrangements typical of contemporary SUVs.
description: A black, mid-sized Toyota SUV with a chrome grille, four doors, silver multi-spoke wheels, and tinted windows. It has a robust, modern design with high ground clearance and visible side steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, Toyota emblem, and windshield with visible dashboard details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, silver side step, and multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, rear window, subtle spoiler, and Toyota badge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, side step, and wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Silver alloy wheels with six thick spokes and a circular center hub
